title: বাহুবলে ট্রাকচাপায় তাবলিগ জামাতের ২ সদস্য নিহত
comment: The article is a straightforward news report about a tragic traffic accident involving members of the Tabligh Jamaat. Stating that one of the victims was a 'freedom fighter' is simply reporting a biographical fact, not a deliberate editorial choice to glorify the Tabligh movement itself.

title: তাবলিগ জামাতের ছয় উসুল
comment: The article neutrally explains the core tenets ('Six Usuls') of the Tabligh Jamaat based on a published academic book. It acts as an informative/educational piece, detailing their beliefs objectively without the journalist endorsing them as the ultimate truth.

title: দ্বীনের দাওয়াতে তাবলিগ জামাতের ভূমিকা
comment: The article frames Tabligh Jamaat highly positively. Written by a religious scholar, it praises the movement's founder for reforming 'misguided' Muslims and prays for Allah to sustain their 'sacrificial' global preaching efforts until the Day of Judgment.

title: কুমিল্লা ভিক্টোরিয়া কলেজের মসজিদে তাবলিগের কার্যক্রম বন্ধের সিদ্ধান্ত, অধ্যক্ষ অবরুদ্ধ
comment: The article neutrally reports on a campus conflict where a college principal banned Tabligh activities due to factional clashes, leading to him being surrounded by protesters. The journalist objectively relays the facts, quotes from both sides, and details of the viral video without taking a side.

title: তাবলিগ জামাতের দুই পক্ষের মধ্যে বিবাদ নিরসনে সরকারের কাছে তিন প্রস্তাব
comment: The article neutrally reports on a press conference by university students proposing solutions to end the factional conflict within Tabligh Jamaat. The reporter objectively conveys the students' demands for peace and an investigation into past violence, maintaining a neutral stance.

title: মুহাম্মদ ইলিয়াসের তাবলিগি দর্শন
comment: The article presents a highly positive, reverent review of a book detailing the philosophy of Tabligh Jamaat's founder. It praises his methodology as a 'living document' of self-purification and urges the modern Muslim world to return to his teachings to solve current crises.

title: নড়াইলের বন্ধ ‘আল্পনা’ সিনেমা হল এখন তাবলিগের ‘মার্কাজ মসজিদ’
comment: The article neutrally reports on the conversion of an abandoned cinema hall into a Tablighi Markaz. It factually covers the leasing details from the local administration and quotes a local businessman expressing satisfaction that a decrepit building is being utilized again.

title: তাবলিগ জামাতের ছয় উসুল
comment: The article is an excerpt from an academic/sociological book exploring the inner workings of the Tabligh Jamaat. It neutrally and descriptively explains their core principles and training methods without actively advocating for the movement.

title: তাবলিগ জামাতের জনপ্রিয়তার পেছনে
comment: The article is an excerpt from a sociological book analyzing the reasons behind Tabligh Jamaat's global popularity. Explaining *why* a movement is popular (e.g., its apolitical nature) is an objective sociological observation, not a subjective endorsement or positive framing by the author.

title: তাবলিগ জামাতের দাওয়াতের ধরন ও নিয়মকানুন
comment: The article is an excerpt from an academic book that sociologically describes the internal logistics, durations, and rules of Tabligh Jamaat's preaching missions (Chillas). The tone is purely informational and descriptive, carrying no editorial bias.
